verses.1: Listen to this word which I take up for a lamentation over you, O house of Israel:
verses.4: For the LORD says to the house of Israel:
verses.6: Seek the LORD, and you will live,
verses.7: You who turn justice to wormwood,
verses.8: Seek him who made the Pleiades and Orion,
verses.9: who brings sudden destruction on the strong,
verses.10: They hate him who reproves in the gate,
verses.11: Therefore, because you trample on the poor and take taxes from him of wheat,
verses.12: For I know how many are your offenses,
verses.13: Therefore a prudent person keeps silent in such a time,
verses.16: Therefore the LORD, the God of Armies, the Lord, says:
verses.17: In all vineyards there will be wailing,
verses.18: “Woe to you who desire the day of the LORD!
verses.19: As if a man fled from a lion,
verses.20: Won’t the day of the LORD be darkness, and not light?
verses.21: I hate, I despise your feasts,
verses.22: Yes, though you offer me your burnt offerings and meal offerings,
verses.23: Take away from me the noise of your songs!
verses.24: But let justice roll on like rivers,
verses.25: “Did you bring to me sacrifices and offerings in the wilderness forty years, house of Israel?
verses.26: You also carried the tent of your king and the shrine of your images, the star of your god, which you made for yourselves.
verses.27: Therefore I will cause you to go into captivity beyond Damascus,” says the LORD, whose name is the God of Armies.
